Introduction

About Me

A quick look at who I am and what I bring to the table.

I'm a final-year B.Sc. Computer Science with Data Science student at Nehru Arts and Science College, Bharathiar University — passionate about working with real-world data to generate actionable insights.

With hands-on experience in Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, and Excel, I enjoy cleaning, analysing, and visualising data to help organisations make smarter decisions.

I completed an internship at Net Tel Solutions where I worked on real datasets, performed data cleaning and visualisation, and contributed to internal analytical reporting.

My Work

Projects

Real-world projects I've built and contributed to.

💸 Final Year Project · 2026
Smart Spend: Web-Based Company Expense Tracking & Visualization System
A full-stack web application that enables employees to submit expense claims, managers to review and approve them through automated workflows, and finance teams to generate detailed reports and visualizations. Built as a final year B.Sc. project at Nehru Arts and Science College under the guidance of M. Senthil Kumar M.Sc., M.Phil., (Ph.D).
Key Features
  • Multi-role system: Employee, Manager, Finance Officer, Admin
  • Automated multi-level approval workflows
  • Real-time budget monitoring with threshold alerts
  • Interactive dashboards: bar, pie, line & heatmap charts
  • Export reports in CSV and PDF formats
  • JWT-based authentication with Role-Based Access Control
Architecture
  • 3-Tier: Presentation → Business Logic → Data Layer
  • REST API backend with server-side validation
  • Responsive design — desktop & mobile compatible
  • Deployable on local server, Vercel, AWS or Docker
Expense Categories
  • Travel, Meals, Accommodation
  • Office Supplies, Software Subscriptions
  • Training, Miscellaneous
